register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your details to get started
register.consent_text: I agree to the terms and conditions of the experiment.
register.consent_section1_text: This platform is part of a longitudinal psychological study on mental well-being. By participating, you agree to provide your sociodemographic details and answer standardized psychometric scales measuring depression, anxiety, and general mental health.
register.consent_section2_text: Your responses are encrypted, stored on secure local servers, and backed up daily. Data exports for research analysis are fully anonymized.
register.consent_section3_text: Important: We evaluate safety and suicide risk indicators. If your responses suggest a high clinical risk, the system automatically triggers a support ticket, and our research team is ethically and legally obligated to reach out to you via phone or WhatsApp to verify your well-being and offer supportive clinical resources.
register.consent_section4_text: Your participation is completely voluntary. You can stop participating or delete your account at any time without any negative consequences.
